title: OpenAI Foundation pledges $1 bil in grants to ensure AI 'benefits all of humanity'
description: OpenAI Foundation, the nonprofit that controls the artificial intelligence company OpenAI and its flagship product ChatGPT, pledged Tuesday to grant out $1 billion over the next year and to build up its capacity as a philanthropic funder. The pledge represents a major development in OpenAI's philanthropic activities and offers insight…
content:

title: Teens get probation after using AI to create fake nudes of classmates
description: Two teenage boys who used artificial intelligence to create fake nude photos of their classmates were put on probation Wednesday and placed in the custody of their parents.
content:
LANCASTER, Pa. (AP) — Two teenage boys who used artificial intelligence to create fake nude photos of their classmates were put on probation Wednesday and placed in the custody of their parents.
The boys, who were 14 at the time, admitted earlier thi... [3836 chars]

title: Professor shares 1 word that’s a giveaway for an AI-written paper
description: A single word keeps turning up in student papers — and it's stirring debate after one professor said it's a telltale sign of artificial intelligence.
content: The em dash has become the telltale tic of the AI age, a piece of punctuation now viewed with suspicion in college essays. But for Matt Prince, an adjunct professor at Chapman University in Southern California, there is another, more revealing giveaw... [1788 chars]

title: Disney CEO’s first week marred by ‘Fortnite,’ OpenAI woes
description: A watershed deal Disney struck with OpenAI late last year dissolved suddenly on Tuesday when the artificial intelligence startup announced it was closing down its Sora video generator app in an effort to streamline its product lineup
content:
Walt Disney Co. Chief Executive Officer Josh D’Amaro hasn’t even been in his new job for one week and he’s already seen two, billion-dollar technology bets falter — with one of them unraveling entirely.
A watershed deal Disney struck with OpenAI late... [3920 chars]
